category_sources: source_facts.description says it applies a diff file to an original; GNU patch project page and GNU documentation identify patch as a diff/merge utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the GNU Savannah patch project; source_facts.package-manager maps brew gpatch to package patch across distributions.
docs_sources: GNU diffutils manual contains the official patch invocation documentation; Savannah GNU patch page is the official project page.
repo_sources: Savannah Git Hosting index lists patch.git with description GNU patch; source_facts.homepage is the GNU Savannah patch project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify the patch command; Savannah Git Hosting lists GNU patch.
